description: Traces vectors head-to-tail in 3D. Requires at least 2 vectors.
utility: Draw a head-to-tail chain of 3D vectors

arguments.name: vectors
arguments.description: Two or more vector3d variable references to chain head-to-tail

arguments.name: styles
arguments.description: Optional: c(), s() for color and stroke styling

alternates.syntax: vectortrace3d(G, v1, v2, v3, size(0.3), c(red))
alternates.description: Trace with custom arrow size and color

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(10,10), view(30, 30))
v1 = vector3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 2, 0, 0))
v2 = vector3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 0, 3, 0))
vectortrace3d(G, v1, v2)

G = g3d(at(10,10), view(30, 30))
v1 = vector3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 2, 0, 0))
v2 = vector3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 0, 3, 0))
v3 = vector3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 0, 0, 1))
vectortrace3d(G, v1, v2, v3, size(0.3), c(teal))
